sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Mawhna vangik puak zawh ding hilo,
Zeisu'n singkhuam tung'h hong puaksak zota,
Ka mawh hong maisak zo, a sin' hongsawp zo,
Aliamma hang natna teng dam khin ta.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Ka kha muangta, ka lungmuang ta,
Kalani ah si To Zeisu sisan hang,
Kuama telzawh loh lungnopna nei khin tang.
Ka etlawm ta Pasian mi dingin
Zeisu paihletin hong ki et ciangin
Tu'n ka kilawm ta hi, Pasian mi dingin,
Pasian mit tawh kei hong ki et ciangin.
Hong ki leizo, hong ki tan zo,
Man tawh kileisa mi khat ka hita,
Kei hong kisam ding hi mopi pawi sungah,
Nang na ut hiam Tuuno pawipi sungah.
